# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Tiao, please report it responsibly through [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/trebeljahr/tiao/security/advisories/new).

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

We will acknowledge your report within 1 week and work with you to understand and address the issue. We'll keep you informed of our progress throughout the process.

## Scope

This policy applies to:
- The Tiao server (`server/`)
- The Tiao client (`client/`)
- The game engine (`shared/`)
- Deployment configurations and CI/CD pipelines

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version deployed to production is actively supported with security updates.
